name: tpm/containerized-dev
description: Containerized multi-workspace development environments with Docker, git worktrees, Claude agent spawning, session handoff, and host daemon services

plugins.name: containerized-dev
plugins.description: Set up and manage containerized multi-workspace development environments with Docker. Handles global port allocation, git worktrees, Claude agent spawning, host-to-container session handoff, host daemon for container-to-host services, and project-specific container configuration.
